summary: A talking-head testimonial for National Apprenticeship Week in which Matthew, an electrical apprentice, stands before an Electrical Training Institute (ETI) banner flanked by flags and describes his five-year program. It is a straightforward subtitled interview with B-roll, no music track or genre styling. Out of scope: single-subject testimonial, not music-driven entertainment.
notable_text: I am currently an apprentice at ETI; ELECTRICAL TRAINING INSTITUTE
